title: Plunzi's Midnight GUI
description: Let your lovely eyes take a rest from too bright LEDs.
body:
# Plunzi's Midnight GUI

Give your eyes a break from too bright LEDs and relax a little with my dark-themed Minecraft GUI resource pack. It’s less bright and themed modern, making it easier on the eyes and a bit more stylish too!

## Examples:


### Survival Hotbar
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6b1101225e703db6feabe47e4a13e2ea82b0f42.png)

### Survival Inventory
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54e8bcd1d6bbda81c0f5a2114686ced259f49bac.png)
